known_issues: Sound not playing in production (Version 8) — affects password entry, Chat section, and general screen touches

existing_features.title: Fix the 'Dreamy.mp3' sound effect on the Lock Screen (password entry page) so it plays successfully when the correct passcode is entered. Ensure the audio file is correctly referenced, loaded, and triggered via user interaction to comply with browser autoplay policies.

Fix the 'Hello.mp3' sound effect on the Chat page so it plays when the Chat section is opened or a message is sent. Ensure the audio file path is correct, the file exists in the public assets, and playback is triggered within a user interaction event handler to avoid autoplay restrictions.

Fix the 'Double Knock.mp3' global click/touch sound in useDoubleKnockSound.ts so it plays on every click or touch event across all pages. Ensure: (1) the MP3 file path resolves correctly in production (use a path relative to the public directory), (2) the Audio object is preloaded, (3) playback is properly triggered, and (4) the 120ms throttle is working without silently suppressing errors.

new_feature_requests.summary: Audit all three audio file references (Dreamy.mp3, Hello.mp3, Double Knock.mp3) and confirm they are placed under frontend/public/ with correct filenames and extensions. Update all import/reference paths in the hooks and pages to use root-relative public asset paths (e.g. '/assets/audio/Dreamy.mp3') so they resolve correctly after the production build.

projectName: Fix audio playback for all sound effects
